prompt: A high-quality 2D anime screenshot of two students talking on a Japanese school stairwell landing. On the left, a blonde anime girl with red eyes, wearing a cream sweater and plaid skirt carries a navy school bag. She looks toward a black spiky-haired anime boy in a black school blazer and striped tie on the right. They stand facing each other mid-conversation. Soft daylight streams through a background window, illuminating the stairs and a 2F directional sign on the wall.
